system.requirement: If you make your own arrows...

abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} by crafting arrows of fine quality, add +1. Then, take +1 supply or +1 momentum on a hit.
When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} by recovering or gathering arrows after a battle, add +2.

When you craft a single arrow designated for a specific foe, envision the process and materials, and roll +wits. On a strong hit, take both. On a weak hit, choose one.

  • Seeker: When a shooter uses the arrow to @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} against this foe, reroll any dice (one time only).
  • Ravager: When a shooter uses the arrow to inflict harm against this foe, inflict +1d6 progress (one time only).
